name: SAKURA NO YUME (DREAMS OF CHERRY BLOSSOMS)

description.value:
Type: Genjutsu (Phantasm)

Rank: 7 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 7

Learn DC: 22 | Successes: 4

Perform: 10 | Perform DC: 24

Components: H

You trap the minds of subjects in the area within a dream-like illusion, causing them to become trapped in a dream-like scene, in the shape of a field of cherry blossoms. The creature is effectively unable to use sight or hearing (including blindsight or blindsense) to detect what is going on around them. You can speak to subjects freely. In addition, the subjects must succeed at a Will save each round to avoid being unable to take any action. Even if they can act, subjects cannot leave the area of effect.

This technique can be dispelled, and immediately ends for any creature that is moved outside of the area of effect.
